name: Lucky Harvest Co.,Ltd.
summary: Lucky Harvest Co.,Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of precision stamping dies and structural metal parts in China. Its products include home appliance accessories, auto accessories, mold parts, power cabinet accessories, aluminum parts, communication device accessories, chassis cabinets, kitchen utensils, and energy conservation and emission reduction parts. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Dongguan City, China.
